project_type: Chinese metaphysics knowledge base - 4-school BaZi theory fusion system
build_system: None formal - knowledge base project. Tools are Python scripts in tools/
test_framework: No automated tests for knowledge consistency. Manual verification against source texts.
verification_instructions: 1. Check that all raw_source file references in YAML point to existing files in sources/. 2. Check that raw_anchor/topic_label in YAML matches the actual section headings in the registry files. 3. Check that conclusion fields contain actual content, not just section references. 4. Spot-check key claims against source texts.
snapshot_or_generated_files: theory/{school}/index.yaml files are auto-generated by tools/build_indexes.py from the raw/promoted registries
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure text/YAML editing
environment_constraints: No build tools needed. All changes are to .md and .yaml files.
contribution_requirements: Per CLAUDE.md: surgical changes only, match existing style, no unnecessary modifications
key_patterns: YAML rules in theory/{school}/index.yaml reference raw_source (source filename), raw_anchor (section in extraction file), raw_file (path to extraction/registry file). The traceability chain is: YAML -> theory/raw/{school}/promoted/ -> theory/raw/{school}/ -> sources/{school}/
relevant_files: theory/raw/gao/extracted/高派_命宫长生诀择日篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md
theory/raw/gao/extracted/高派_大运流年篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md
theory/raw/gao/extracted/高派_神煞应用宝典_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md
theory/raw/gao/extracted/高派_财运事业断法_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md
theory/raw/gao/extracted/高派_车祸婚姻篇_候选规律提取_2026-05-19.md
directory_structure: sources/{gao,duan,yang,ren}/ = immutable original texts; theory/raw/{school}/ = extraction notes; theory/raw/{school}/promoted/ = structured registries; theory/{school}/index.yaml = final structured rules
